title: Spicy Sellou Empanadas
description: Crispy empanadas filled with sweet and spicy sellou, perfect as a snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, lard or shortening, and water. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 8-10 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place 1-2 tablespoons of sellou in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the fillings to form a triangle or square shape. Press edges to seal.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan over medium heat. Fry empanadas until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve warm.
